Config structs load via config.Load in the Config phase and inject
anywhere: hooks, providers, handler structs. Unused config warns.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/config.go --
package shared

//fabrik:config http
type Config struct {
	Addr string `yaml:"addr" env:"APP_HTTP_ADDR" default:":8080"`
}

//fabrik:hook setup
func InitLogger(c *Config) error {
	_ = c.Addr
	return nil
}

//fabrik:config unused
type Unused struct {
	X string `yaml:"x"`
}
-- store/config.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

type DB struct{ kind string }

//fabrik:provider
func Open(c *Config) *DB { return &DB{kind: c.Kind} }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/shared"
	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Config *shared.Config
	DB     *store.DB
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"sync/atomic"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/shared"
	"app/store"
	"app/web"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()

	var signaled atomic.Bool
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		signaled.Store(true)
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	var shutdownWaits []func(context.Context) error
	defer func() {
		cancel()
		drainCtx, drainCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
		defer drainCancel()
		var drainErr error
		for _, wait := range shutdownWaits {
			if e := wait(drainCtx); e != nil && drainErr == nil {
				drainErr = e
			}
		}
		if signaled.Load() && errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) {
			err = nil
		}
		if err == nil {
			err = drainErr
		}
	}()

	// Config
	sharedConfig, err := config.Load[shared.Config](
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"),
		config.KnownSections("http", "store", "unused"),
		config.Section("http"),
	)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	storeConfig, err := config.Load[store.Config](
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"),
		config.KnownSections("http", "store", "unused"),
		config.Section("store"),
	)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Setup: after config, before providers
	if err := shared.InitLogger(sharedConfig); err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Providers
	storeDB := store.Open(storeConfig)
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
		Config: sharedConfig,
		DB:     storeDB,
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Index)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: r}
	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- srv.ListenAndServe() }()
	select {
	case err := <-errc:
		if errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
			return nil
		}
		return err
	case <-ctx.Done():
	}
	shutdownCtx, shutdownCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
	defer shutdownCancel()
	return srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
}
-- want/diags --
warning: shared/config.go:14:1: config struct Unused is never used
  help: inject it into a provider, hook, or handler struct, or remove the directive
